raw_consumer_statement: I opened a Macy 's credit card on XX/XX/XXXX. I never had any late payments for this card. In XX/XX/XXXX, Macy 's suddenly contacted me and told me that I had a late payment of {$340.00}, which was past due 180 days. I was very surprised because I did not use this card for a while. I told Macy 's that this was a fraud and it looked like someone might have stolen the info on my card and made the purchases. I asked Macy 's to provide details of my bills and the transactions for this charge ( payment of {$340.00} ). Per my request, Macy 's closed the account of my credit card. They sent me a bill statement without any details. The statement had only a total charge of {$340.00} without any details. It didn't include any details of any transactions for this payment. I kept asking Macy 's so many times to send me the details of the statement and the transactions. They never send me any details of the billing statement and transactions for this payment/charge. Macy 's kept calling me to make this payment without providing me with any details of the billing statement or transactions. Recently, I checked my credit report and I saw this charge is still on my credit report. I disputed this charge/payment with XXXX. A little over two weeks ago, I received a letter from Macy 's that my dispute was rejected without providing me any details for this. I called Macy 's immediately and they asked me to make the payment for this. I requested them to send me a billing statement and details of transactions for this again. They told me that they would send it to me. As of today, XX/XX/XXXX ( a little over two weeks ago when I requested the statement ), Macy 's still has not sent me any statement. Today, I called them and asked them why they didn't send me the statement and details of the transactions. Macy 's told me that they couldn't provide me with details of the transactions and billing statements. Then, I asked them to remove this charge from my credit report. They refused to do it and they told me that they are willing to accept the payment if I plan to make the payment. It looks like that they will remove this charge from my credit report after I make the payment. I told them that I am willing to make the payment if they can send me details of the billing statements and transactions for this charge. They refused to do that.
